steps.title: Test the point in the first inequality
steps.content:
A solution must satisfy both inequalities. For $(12,0)$, the first inequality becomes
$$
0\le 12+6
$$
$$
0\le 18
$$
This is true.

steps.title: Test the second inequality
steps.content: Now test the same point in the second inequality: $$ 0\ge -3(12)-2 $$ $$ 0\ge -38 $$ This is also true, so the point satisfies the system. The answer is D.
